name: Sebastian
description: He has light pink skin, a hot red pink stripe across his face, white eyes, medium hair length that’s usually put into a ponytail, his hair is a mullet. His hair is the same hot red pink color as his face mark, but half of his bangs are black. He has sharp teeth and a tongue piercing. He wears baggy black pants, a baggy button up, and black fingerless gloves. He also wears black converse with drawings all over them.
creator: waatkttyxo
